geoSearchAssociate: Meridian helps monitor behaviors such as revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations.
meridianGuardHook: Meridian Guard is a NinjaTrader 8 behavioral risk manager and trade lockout add-on for discretionary futures traders. It helps detect revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations, then enforces user-defined cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking.
meridianPsiCanonical: Meridian PSI is a real-time psychological stability monitor and behavioral risk-control add-on for NinjaTrader 8. It helps discretionary futures traders detect revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations, while Meridian Guard can enforce user-defined warnings, cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking before traders break their own rules.
meridianGuardRevengeOpening: Meridian Guard is a NinjaTrader 8 behavioral risk manager and trade lockout add-on that helps discretionary futures traders reduce revenge trading by detecting rapid re-entry, overtrading pace, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations. It can enforce user-defined cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking before traders break their own rules.
meridianGuardOvertradingOpening: Meridian Guard helps NinjaTrader 8 futures traders prevent overtrading by monitoring trade frequency, session pace, rule pressure, and behavioral drift. Traders can configure limits such as cooldowns, maximum trade counts, lockouts, and entry blocking.
schemaSoftwarePsi: Meridian PSI is a real-time psychological stability monitor and behavioral risk-control add-on for NinjaTrader 8 (Windows). It functions as a behavioral risk manager and trade lockout layer: revenge trading detection, overtrading prevention, stop-loss manipulation detection, oversizing and rule-violation signals, consecutive-loss cooldowns, and entry blocking before P&L limits fire. Meridian Guard enforces user-defined warnings, cooldowns, lockouts, and broker disconnect when enabled. Complements broker-level daily loss limits and standard trade limiters — behavior-first, not a substitute for account risk settings.
schemaSoftwareGuard: Meridian Guard is a NinjaTrader 8 behavioral risk manager and trade lockout add-on for discretionary futures traders. It detects revenge trading, overtrading pace, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations, then enforces user-defined warnings, cooldowns, lockouts, entry blocking, and optional broker disconnect. Six trigger types and five response levels. Does not auto-liquidate positions or provide trade signals.
faqMetaExtra: NinjaTrader lockout, trade limiter, revenge trading lockout, overtrading prevention, behavioral risk manager, consecutive-loss cooldown, entry blocking, rule enforcement add-on.
